steps.title: Use the same-accuracy clue
steps.content: The semicolon explains the blank: the program's accuracy was nearly the same on Washington, DC, images and Boston images. The phrase must express comparable performance.

steps.title: Reject illogical descriptions
steps.content: A suggests uncertainty, not comparable accuracy. C says the performance was different or distinct, contradicting "nearly the same." D describes an attitude of support, which does not fit performance data. The answer is B.
